nasb.text: For what does the Scripture say? “Abraham believed God, and it was credited to him as righteousness.”

esv.text: For what does the Scripture say? “Abraham believed God, and it was counted to him as righteousness.”

cnv.text: 經上怎麼樣說呢？“亞伯拉罕信　神，這就算為他的義。”

ccb.text: 圣经上不是说“亚伯拉罕信上帝，就被算为义人”吗？

csbs.text: 经上到底是怎么说的呢？ “亚伯拉罕信神， 这就被算为他的义。”
